issue: TOC anchors for H3 sections used single-dash numeric anchor form rejected by the local sk-doc validator.
evidence: README TOC referenced #31-how-it-works and #32-feature-reference while validator expects #31--how-it-works and #32--feature-reference.
recommended_fix: Update TOC anchors to the validator-compatible double-dash form.

issue: Skill lacked an assets folder while sibling deep skills already exposed runtime asset families.
evidence: Inventory showed deep-ai-council references/scripts/playbook/catalog but no assets directory; deep-research and deep-review both had config, strategy, dashboard, prompt-pack, and runtime capabilities.
recommended_fix: Add council-specific operational assets only where tied to documented workflow needs.

issue: Reference family had no first-touch quick reference or full loop protocol matching the shared deep-skill navigation shape.
evidence: Inventory listed output, state, convergence, seat, graph, failure and deep-mode references but no quick_reference.md or loop_protocol.md.
recommended_fix: Create council-specific quick_reference.md and loop_protocol.md without borrowing research/review vocabulary.

issue: README version and resource counts were stale after prior releases and this alignment.
evidence: README reported version 2.1.0.0 and 11 references while SKILL.md was already 2.1.1.0 and the package had more references after this phase.
recommended_fix: Bump README version/counts and structure tree to include new references/assets and changelog range.

issue: Review reference family lacked focused convergence/state split files now present in deep-research.
evidence: Inventory listed only convergence.md, loop_protocol.md, quick_reference.md, and state_format.md before this phase.
recommended_fix: Add review-specific convergence_signals.md, state_outputs.md, and state_reducer_registry.md and wire them into router/README.

issue: README version was stale compared with SKILL/changelog history.
evidence: README reported 1.9.0.0 while SKILL.md was 1.10.0.0 before this alignment.
recommended_fix: Update README to 1.10.1.0 after adding focused references and changelog.

issue: Deep-research already matched the target split reference and asset family; adding new resources would be redundant.
evidence: Inventory showed quick_reference.md, loop_protocol.md, convergence*.md, state*.md, config, strategy, dashboard, prompt-pack, and runtime capability assets.
recommended_fix: Preserve existing resource family, update version/navigation only, and record rationale in changelog.

issue: No review asset changes were needed because the asset family was already complete.
evidence: Inventory showed config, strategy, dashboard, prompt-pack, review_mode_contract.yaml, and runtime_capabilities.json.
recommended_fix: Do not add duplicate or decorative assets; document preservation in resource-map and changelog.
